docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-27-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-27-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY HER DAUGHTER CHUYI CHENG--MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WANG, YUZHEN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT OUSTERHOUT, DOULGLAS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
